title: Open Field
steps: Habituate naive mice to the room for 01:00:00 .
Transfer each mouse to a custom 40 cm x 40 cm dark box, with a clear floor and a light suspended on the center of the apparatus.
After each test and between each group, clean apparatus thoroughly with 50% ethanol followed by water.

Analysis : Center of open field is defined by the space located at least 5 cm from any given wall. Time in the center, distance travelled, and average speed is obtained by the built-in functions of the tracking software Ethovision XT11.
creator: Jacquelyn Haytayan
